leadership_roles.description: Served as the official GeeksforGeeks Campus Mantri at PESITM, promoting coding culture and technical learning among students.
responsibilities: Promoted coding culture and technical learning among students
Organized and supported workshops, coding sessions, and awareness events
Helped students access GeeksforGeeks resources, courses, and contests
Built and engaged a strong on-campus tech community
Encouraged participation in DSA practice and skill-development activities
Conducted DSA sessions and technical workshops
Connected students to GeeksforGeeks learning resources
impact: Built a strong on-campus tech community
Increased student engagement with DSA and competitive programming
Organized multiple coding sessions and workshops

leadership_roles.description: Representing Anvesana Innovation & Entrepreneurial Forum on campus, organizing technical events, and driving entrepreneurship awareness among students.
responsibilities: Represented the organization on campus and increased student awareness about innovation and entrepreneurship programs
Promoted events, challenges, and technical initiatives among students
Helped connect interested students with startup and innovation opportunities
Supported outreach and engagement activities through campaigns and peer networking
Encouraged participation in innovation, leadership, and skill-building events
Organized 4+ technical events and workshops with 30+ student participants
Coordinated entrepreneurship awareness campaigns across campus
impact: Increased campus awareness about innovation and entrepreneurship
